Trajectory identifiers of a Tracks

Source: R/Tracks.R
ids.Rd

Trajectory identifiers of a Tracks

Usage

ids(x)

# S4 method for class 'Tracks'
ids(x)

Arguments

x

A [Tracks-class] object.

Value

The unique trajectory ids, in first-appearance order.

Examples

ids(cpunctatus)
#>   [1] "10_1_1"   "10_10_1"  "10_11_1"  "10_12_1"  "10_13_1"  "10_14_1" 
#>   [7] "10_15_1"  "10_16_1"  "10_17_1"  "10_19_1"  "10_2_1"   "10_20_1" 
#>  [13] "10_23_1"  "10_24_1"  "10_26_1"  "10_27_1"  "10_28_1"  "10_29_1" 
#>  [19] "10_3_1"   "10_33_1"  "10_35_1"  "10_39_1"  "10_41_1"  "10_45_1" 
#>  [25] "10_5_1"   "10_6_1"   "10_7_1"   "10_8_1"   "10_9_1"   "15_10_1" 
#>  [31] "15_11_1"  "15_13_1"  "15_14_1"  "15_16_1"  "15_19_1"  "15_2_1"  
#>  [37] "15_21_1"  "15_23_1"  "15_24_1"  "15_25_1"  "15_26_1"  "15_27_1" 
#>  [43] "15_28_1"  "15_29_1"  "15_3_1"   "15_30_1"  "15_32_1"  "15_35_1" 
#>  [49] "15_36_1"  "15_41_1"  "15_42_1"  "15_44_1"  "15_47_1"  "15_48_1" 
#>  [55] "15_49_1"  "15_50_1"  "15_51_1"  "15_7_1"   "15_9_1"   "20_10_1" 
#>  [61] "20_11_1"  "20_13_1"  "20_14_1"  "20_16_1"  "20_18_1"  "20_19_1" 
#>  [67] "20_2_1"   "20_20_1"  "20_22_1"  "20_24_1"  "20_26_1"  "20_27_1" 
#>  [73] "20_28_1"  "20_29_1"  "20_3_1"   "20_30_1"  "20_33_1"  "20_35_1" 
#>  [79] "20_36_1"  "20_39_1"  "20_41_1"  "20_47_1"  "20_48_1"  "20_5_1"  
#>  [85] "20_7_1"   "20_9_1"   "30_1_1"   "30_10_1"  "30_11_1"  "30_12_1" 
#>  [91] "30_13_1"  "30_14_1"  "30_15_1"  "30_16_1"  "30_17_1"  "30_18_1" 
#>  [97] "30_19_1"  "30_2_1"   "30_20_1"  "30_24_1"  "30_26_1"  "30_27_1" 
#> [103] "30_28_1"  "30_29_1"  "30_3_1"   "30_30_1"  "30_32_1"  "30_33_1" 
#> [109] "30_36_1"  "30_39_1"  "30_42_1"  "30_43_1"  "30_44_1"  "30_46_1" 
#> [115] "30_47_1"  "30_49_1"  "30_5_1"   "30_50_1"  "30_51_1"  "30_6_1"  
#> [121] "30_7_1"   "30_8_1"   "30_9_1"   "40_10_1"  "40_11_1"  "40_13_1" 
#> [127] "40_14_1"  "40_16_1"  "40_17_1"  "40_18_1"  "40_19_1"  "40_2_1"  
#> [133] "40_24_1"  "40_26_1"  "40_27_1"  "40_3_1"   "40_30_1"  "40_32_1" 
#> [139] "40_33_1"  "40_49_1"  "40_5_1"   "40_6_1"   "40_7_1"   "5_10_1"  
#> [145] "5_11_1"   "5_12_1"   "5_13_1"   "5_16_1"   "5_17_1"   "5_19_1"  
#> [151] "5_2_1"    "5_21_1"   "5_22_1"   "5_23_1"   "5_25_1"   "5_26_1"  
#> [157] "5_29_1"   "5_3_1"    "5_32_1"   "5_35_1"   "5_36_1"   "5_41_1"  
#> [163] "5_42_1"   "5_44_1"   "5_45_1"   "5_46_1"   "5_47_1"   "5_48_1"  
#> [169] "5_49_1"   "5_5_1"    "5_6_1"    "5_7_1"    "5_8_1"    "5_9_1"   
#> [175] "50_1_1"   "50_10_1"  "50_11_1"  "50_14_1"  "50_16_1"  "50_2_1"  
#> [181] "50_20_1"  "50_22_1"  "50_24_1"  "50_25_1"  "50_26_1"  "50_27_1" 
#> [187] "50_28_1"  "50_29_1"  "50_3_1"   "50_32_1"  "50_33_1"  "50_39_1" 
#> [193] "50_40_1"  "50_41_1"  "50_42_1"  "50_43_1"  "50_44_1"  "50_50_1" 
#> [199] "50_7_1"   "50_9_1"   "con_1_1"  "con_10_1" "con_11_1" "con_12_1"
#> [205] "con_13_1" "con_14_1" "con_15_1" "con_16_1" "con_19_1" "con_2_1" 
#> [211] "con_20_1" "con_23_1" "con_24_1" "con_25_1" "con_26_1" "con_27_1"
#> [217] "con_28_1" "con_29_1" "con_3_1"  "con_33_1" "con_35_1" "con_36_1"
#> [223] "con_39_1" "con_41_1" "con_44_1" "con_47_1" "con_48_1" "con_49_1"
#> [229] "con_5_1"  "con_50_1" "con_51_1" "con_6_1"  "con_7_1"  "con_8_1" 
#> [235] "con_9_1"
